name: Hot Balloon Safari
highlights: Enjoy a bird's-eye view of Goa's hinterlands and scenic landscapes.

name: Rome of the Orient
highlights: Explore Old Goa churches and Panjim city heritage.

name: Heritage Trails
highlights: Visit Menezes Braganza House, Palacio do Deao and Goa Chitra Museum.

name: Temple & Spice Tour
highlights: Visit Mangueshi Temple and enjoy a traditional spice plantation tour.

name: Cola Beach Tour
highlights: Relax at the secluded Cola Beach with pristine natural beauty.

name: Anjuna Flea Market
highlights: Explore Goa's famous flea market for shopping and local culture.

name: Secrets of Divar Island on Cycle
highlights: Cycle through scenic Divar Island villages and countryside.

name: Culinary Delights
highlights: Cook and enjoy authentic Goan cuisine with local experts.

name: The Essential Whiskey Experience
highlights: Discover traditional Goan whiskey making and tasting experience.

name: Island Fantasy
highlights: Dolphin viewing, snorkeling and swim at Virgin Beach.

name: Crocodile Dundee
highlights: Backwater cruise with crocodile spotting and bird watching.

name: White Water Rafting
highlights: Exciting rafting experience on the Mhadei River near Valpoi.

name: The Goan Village Tour
highlights: Experience authentic Goan village life and local traditions.

name: Feni & Food
days: Mid October till end of May
highlights: Visit Goa's famous Feni cellar and enjoy traditional food.

name: Bird Watching Tour
highlights: Guided bird watching at Carambolim Lake and nearby wetlands.

name: Diving
highlights: Scuba diving experience in Goa's underwater world.

name: Fishing Trip
highlights: Deep sea fishing experience in the Arabian Sea.

name: Deep Sea Cruising
highlights: Luxury yacht cruise with dolphin spotting and BBQ.

name: Backwater Cruise
highlights: Houseboat cruise through Goa's scenic backwaters.

name: Dandeli Wildlife
highlights: Jungle safari and wildlife experience at Dandeli.

name: Hampi Tour
highlights: Explore ancient ruins and architecture of Hampi.

name: Kayaking Expeditions
highlights: Kayak through mangroves, rivers and backwaters.

name: Dudhsagar Waterfalls
highlights: Visit the majestic Dudhsagar Falls and enjoy jungle jeep safari.
